summary: Iteration 27 - P0 fixes testing complete. All critical features verified: location filters CZ/WORLD across SpecialistsPage/SupportPage/NearbyPage, admin settings propagation via AppSettingsContext, text settings overwrite, featured items reorder with up/down arrows, homepage no 'Kde chces zacit?', profile page country toggle, registration form CZ/WORLD toggle. Backend: 26/26 tests passed. Frontend: all 10 feature scenarios verified.

feature_test_results.specialists_cz_world_toggle: PASS - CZ/WORLD toggle buttons present (data-testid=country-filter-CZ/WORLD), WORLD activates and shows world specialists, region filter updates accordingly
feature_test_results.support_page_location_filter: PASS - Location filter dropdown present, Create dialog has CZ/WORLD toggle (data-testid=form-country-CZ/WORLD), toggling WORLD activates correctly
feature_test_results.nearby_page_cz_world_toggle: PASS - CZ/WORLD toggle present (data-testid=nearby-country-CZ/WORLD), WORLD activates and location select updates
feature_test_results.admin_section_settings_propagation: PASS - Edit sections button works, saving title 'TEST_Odborníci_Iter27' shows on SpecialistsPage immediately via AppSettingsContext.refresh()
feature_test_results.admin_marker_colors_propagation: PASS - Color inputs appear (7 color pickers), saving specialist color #FF5500 shows as orange on section marker (rgb(255, 85, 0)) on Specialists page
feature_test_results.admin_text_settings_overwrite: PASS - 'O projektu' text editable, V1 save works, V2 overwrites V1 correctly, value persists after reload
feature_test_results.admin_featured_items_reorder: PASS - 2 specialists added as featured, ArrowUp/ArrowDown buttons visible, clicking move-down swaps 'TEST Dr. Jana Nováková' and 'Test Dokto submitted' order, new order reflected on homepage 'Doporučujeme' section
feature_test_results.homepage_no_kde_chces_zacit: PASS - Homepage does not contain 'Kde chces zacit?' heading, hero section is compact
feature_test_results.homepage_featured_section_visible: PASS - After adding 2 featured specialists, 'Doporučujeme' section appeared on homepage showing them in the reordered sequence
feature_test_results.profile_country_toggle: PASS - CZ/WORLD toggle present on Profile (data-testid=profile-country-CZ/WORLD), CZ active by default, both toggles clickable and activate correctly
feature_test_results.registration_cz_world_toggle: PASS - Registration form has CZ/WORLD toggle (data-testid=reg-country-CZ/WORLD), 'Česká republika' and 'Svět' labels, WORLD activates on click
feature_test_results.featured_items_id_field: PASS - /api/featured-items returns id field on each item (required for reorder API call)
feature_test_results.featured_items_reorder_api: PASS - PUT /api/admin/featured-items/reorder with item_ids array works, orders updated correctly
feature_test_results.text_settings_overwrite_api: PASS - PUT /api/admin/settings/texts with same key twice correctly overwrites value
feature_test_results.locations_country_field: PASS - /api/locations returns country field (CZ or WORLD) on each item, filter by country=CZ and country=WORLD works

critical_code_review_comments: ProfilePage useEffect for profileCountry only triggers when allLocations loads (not when location changes) - correct implementation, auto-detects from saved location on mount
AdminPage.js is very large (1800+ lines) - recommend splitting into sub-components for maintainability
handleMoveFeatured uses filter+sort on featuredItems array which is correct; the id field in GET /api/featured-items response enables the reorder API to work
SectionHeader.jsx reads from AppSettingsContext (markerColors + sections) and fallbacks to props - correct and clean
AppSettingsContext.refresh() is called after admin saves (marker colors, section settings) - this correctly triggers context re-load and UI updates without page refresh
seed_data_creation: Added and removed 2 test featured specialists (Test Dokto submitted, TEST Dr. Jana Nováková) during reorder testing. Temporarily changed about_text to 'TEST_About_V2_Iter27' during text settings test - restored to empty string. Temporarily changed specialists section title to 'TEST_Odborníci_Iter27' - restored to 'Trans-friendly odborníci'. Temporarily changed specialists marker color to #FF5500 - restored to #8A7CFF.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 verified all P0 fixes: (1) Location filter CZ/WORLD works on SpecialistsPage, SupportPage, NearbyPage - all have country toggle buttons with correct data-testid attributes and the region/location dropdowns update when toggled; (2) Admin marker colors save + AppSettingsContext.refresh() propagates immediately to UI (section-marker style updates); (3) Admin section settings (title/subtitle) save + context.refresh() propagates immediately; (4) Admin text settings support overwrite - PUT twice with same key correctly updates value; (5) Featured items reorder: up/down ArrowUp/ArrowDown buttons work, PUT /api/admin/featured-items/reorder with [id2, id1] swaps order, homepage Doporučujeme shows new order; (6) Profile page has CZ/WORLD toggle (profileCountry state), auto-detects from user's saved location via useEffect when allLocations loads; (7) Registration form has reg-country-CZ/reg-country-WORLD toggle. All 26 backend tests and 10 frontend scenarios PASS. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_bloom_iteration27.py
